hero.title: Build Your Website
hero.subtitle: Choose the speed of AI or the expert touch of a professional developer. No hassle.

howItWorks.title: How Does It Work?
howItWorks.step1Desc: Tell us what you need and set your budget. Quick and commitment-free.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Generate your site instantly with AI or select an expert developer.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Get your site ready to launch or schedule a meeting with your developer.

features.title: Power Up Your Business
features.aiGeneratorDesc: Create your site instantly by describing your idea. AI handles the rest.
features.reqBuilderDesc: Define your project step by step with our guided tool.
features.schedulingDesc: Book a meeting with your developer in seconds, hassle-free.
features.pricingDesc: You set your budget. No surprises or hidden costs.

aiBuilder.title: Generate your website instantly
aiBuilder.subtitle: Describe your idea and our AI will create a professional website in seconds. No code, no waiting.
aiBuilder.placeholder: A modern restaurant with an interactive menu...
aiBuilder.chatSubtitle: Describe the website you want and I'll generate it for you
aiBuilder.simResponse: I've analyzed your request. In a production environment, this would generate a live website preview. The AI builder integration will be connected in a future update. For now, you can see how the interface works!

devMarketplace.title: Our Experts
devMarketplace.subtitle: Prefer the human touch? Connect with verified professional developers.

pricing.title: You Set Your Budget
pricing.subtitle: Choose the option that best fits your business. No surprises.
pricing.starterDesc: Perfect to start your digital presence.
pricing.proDesc: For businesses that need more power.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.t1Quote: In 10 minutes my site was ready with the AI generator. Incredible speed. My business now has a digital presence!
testimonials.t2Quote: I worked with a massoAI developer for my SaaS platform. Professional, fast, and fairly priced. 100% recommended.
testimonials.t3Quote: I knew nothing about technology and now I have a beautiful online store. massoAI made the whole process easy and fun.

finalCta.title: Start Building
finalCta.subtitle: Thousands of entrepreneurs trust massoAI. What are you waiting for?

footer.description: The #1 platform to create websites with AI or expert developers.

auth.registerDescription: Enter your details to register with massoAI.
auth.loginDescription: Enter your credentials to sign in to massoAI.

errors.userAlreadyExists: It looks like you already have an account. Please try logging in instead.
errors.userNotFound: We couldn't find an account with that email. Please check your email or sign up.
errors.invalidPassword: That password doesn't look right. Please try again or reset your password.
errors.internalServerError: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again in a moment.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
errors.validationFailed: Please check your information and try again.
errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.fullnameMinLength: Full name must be at least 2 characters
errors.fullnameMaxLength: Full name must be less than 50 characters
errors.phoneMinLength: Phone number must be at least 8 characters
errors.phoneMaxLength: Phone number must be less than 20 characters
errors.passwordMinLengthRegister: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.passwordMaxLength: Password must be less than 100 characters
errors.passwordRegex: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one number

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your projects and builds
dashboard.emptyDesc: Create your first project to get started. Build with AI or work with a developer.

newProject.title: Start a New Project
newProject.subtitle: Choose how you'd like to build your website
newProject.aiDesc: Describe your idea and let AI generate your website instantly
newProject.devDesc: Connect with an expert developer to build your project

bookDev.title: Book a Developer
bookDev.subtitle: Choose a developer to work with on your project
bookDev.ideaPlaceholder: Describe your project idea, goals, and any specific requirements...

bookConfirm.title: Booking Confirmed!
bookConfirm.subtitle: Your meeting has been scheduled successfully
bookConfirm.emailSent: A confirmation email has been sent with the meeting details.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and preferences
settings.notifyBookingDesc: Get notified when a booking is confirmed
settings.notifyAiReadyDesc: Get notified when your AI build is ready
settings.dangerDesc: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.
settings.deleteConfirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. All your projects and data will be permanently deleted.
